name: Spiced Pumpkin Bread
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Canned or Cooked Mashed Pumpkins
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Southern Living, 1991 Annual Recipes
1. Beat butter at medium speed of an electric mixer.
2. Gradually add sugar, beating well. Add eggs one at a time, beating after each addition.
3. Add molasses, orange juice, and mashed pumpkins to the mixture.
4. Combine flour and the next five ingredients; stir in until just combined with the creamed mixture.
5. Stir in vanilla extract, raisins, and chopped pecans.
6. Spoon batter into four greased and floured 7-inch x 3-1/2-inch x 2-inch loaf pans.
7. Bake at 350°F for 50 to 55 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
8. Cool in pans for 10 minutes; remove from pans and let cool completely on a wire rack.
Yield: Four 7-inch loaves.
